name: Structural Systems Intake
description: Structural systems intake for construction and renovation projects. Evaluates a project's structural system type, existing condition, proposed modifications, geotechnical basis, seismic and wind exposure, engineer engagement, and coordination posture to produce a structural systems profile with gap analysis, risk flags, and recommended pre-design actions.

privacy.disclosure: A summary of this session will be available for review.

types.name: Structural Systems Profile
types.description: Generated structural systems profile from intake session data.
